sub_modules.nr_poly_eval: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner's method.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_update_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block with fixed-point division and saturation.
sub_modules.nr_convergence_check: Combinational convergence detector based on update magnitude and zero derivative handling.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block that checks whether the final polynomial residual is within tolerance.
